name: SBC Benefic House Entry on Janma Nakshatra — Property Culmination Day
description: Sarvatobhadra Chakra (SBC) benefic planet entering the house corresponding to Janma Nakshatra triggers exact property culmination timing — the deal closes, registration happens, or possession is taken.

source_text.quote: When benefic planets enter the SBC house of the birth star, auspicious events relating to property, vehicles, and comfort materialize on that very day.

all_of: A natural benefic (Jupiter/Venus/Mercury/Moon) transits the SBC house position of the native's Janma Nakshatra
any_of: The benefic is Jupiter (strongest for property)
Multiple benefics in SBC house simultaneously
none_of: Malefic planet simultaneously afflicts the same SBC house

interpretation.meaning: SBC activation on Janma Nakshatra is the most precise timing tool for property events. When a benefic enters this specific SBC house, property materialization happens within days.

metadata.notes: SBC is Varahamihira's precise timing tool. Janma Nakshatra activation is the strongest personal trigger. Used for muhurta-level property timing.

name: Lagna Lord + 4th Lord Conjunction (Exact) — Property Deal Moment
description: Transit Lagna lord coming into exact conjunction (within 3°) with transit or natal 4th lord creates the precise moment for property deal closure — self (Lagna) meets property (4th).

source_text.quote: When the lord of the ascendant conjoins the lord of the 4th in transit, the native acquires property, home, and land at that very time.

all_of: Transit Lagna lord is within 3° of transit/natal 4th lord
any_of: Both planets are in friendly/own signs

interpretation.meaning: The exact conjunction of Lagna lord (self/identity) with 4th lord (property/home) is the astronomical moment when the native and property come together — the deal is sealed.

metadata.notes: This is a fast trigger that pinpoints the exact day/week within the broader property window. Most powerful when both lords are fast-moving.

name: Mars Conjunct Lagna/Moon Lord (Exact within 2°) — Land Action Day
description: Transit Mars coming into exact conjunction (within 2°) with natal Lagna lord or Moon lord creates the precise day of land action — property registration, plot booking, or construction start.

source_text.quote: When Mars exactly conjoins the Lagna lord or Moon's dispositor lord, land transactions happen with speed and decisiveness that very day.

all_of: Transit Mars is within 2° of natal Lagna lord OR natal Moon lord longitude
any_of: Mars is aspected by Jupiter (benefic protection)
The conjunction happens in a property house (4th/2nd/11th)

interpretation.meaning: Mars (Bhumi Karaka/land) in exact conjunction with Lagna lord (self) or Moon lord (mind) is the action trigger — the native decisively acts on property. This is the day of signing, registration, or ground-breaking.

metadata.notes: Mars moves ~0.5°/day so 2° orb gives ~4 days window. This is the decisive action moment within the broader property period.
